pi_items.source: setup_task.sh lines 13-19 creates user with id 'contractor_sam' via Nuxeo REST API; verifier.py line 32 confirms this is the expected user
setup_task.sh line 23 calls create_doc_if_missing with path '/default-domain/workspaces/VendorContracts'; export_result.sh line 22 queries this exact path via REST API with acls enricher

verifier.py line 33 expects 'ReadWrite' from metadata; Nuxeo documentation (doc.nuxeo.com) confirms ReadWrite is a valid standard permission level in Nuxeo Platform; verifier.py lines 85-91 validate this permission matches exactly

verifier.py line 34 expects '2026-12-31' from metadata; verifier.py lines 104-118 parse the ACE 'end' field and match against this date string; format is ISO 8601 (YYYY-MM-DD); date is in future relative to context date 2026-03-08

privileged_info_summary: All task metadata claims are verified and accurate. The task is configured to grant user 'contractor_sam' ReadWrite permissions on the VendorContracts workspace at path /default-domain/workspaces/VendorContracts with expiration date 2026-12-31. All values are hardcoded in the task configuration and setup script, with no external real-world data sources. ReadWrite is a valid standard Nuxeo permission level. The task operates on synthetic data created within a Nuxeo Docker environment for testing purposes.
